title: Nihhiu Music
description: Replaces the game's music with remixes made by Nihhiu.
body:
**None of this music was made by me. All of it was made by [Nihhiu](https://www.youtube.com/c/Nihhiu/featured). I have obtained permission to distribute this pack with credit for no profit.**

Replaces the game's music with tracks made by Nihhiu. Their music is high quality and high energy. More music will be added to the pack as they upload remixes. This pack includes publically available non-finalised remixes.

List of completed songs:
- Minecraft
- Clark
- Sweden
- Biome Fest
- Blind Spots
- Haunt Muskie
- Aria Math
- Dreiton
- Taswell
- Subwoofer Lullaby
- Living Mice
- Haggstrom
- Danny
- Key
- Oxygène
- Dry Hands
- Wet Hands
- Mice on Venus
- Axolotl
- Dragon Fish
- Shuniji
- Concrete Halls
- Warmth
- Infinite Amethyst
- Mutation
- Moog City 2
- Beginning 2

[Dynamic Music](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dynamic-music) exclusive:
- Excuse
- Flake
- Ki
- Death
- Équinoxe
- Moog City
- Eleven
- Chris

Note: this resource pack does not contain the necessary assets to make the Dynamic Music tracks play in the game. To do that, you will need to use a version of the mod prior to 1.2.0.1 or extract the assets from said version into a resource pack and load it **under** this one.
